title: xara modpack
description: This is a modpack that plans to enhance both client and server gameplay.
body:
this modpack is a combination of selected mods to add an extra dimension, graphical improvements, performance improvements and more to your game/server. 

what's included?

new features: add new gameplay mechanics to your game like Custom Portals, JourneyMap, IndyPets and Friends&Foes, Stackable.

add visual improvements to your game with mods like Explosive Enhancement, Do a Barrel Roll, Zoomify, Visuality, LambDynamicLight.

easy playability and performance: optimize your gaming experience with mods like BetterF3, Mod Menu, NetherPortalFix.

warning: this modpack created from boredom.

<details>
